title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.987 - Training to be provided for employees in robbery deterrence and safety — time limitation to provide
text:
407.987.  Training to be provided for employees in robbery deterrence and safety — time limitation to provide. — The operator of a convenience business shall provide each employee with training in proper robbery deterrence and safety within sixty days of an employee's date of employment or if a person is an employee on January 1, 1997, then by July 1, 1997.
(L. 1995 S.B. 446 § 6, A.L. 1997 H.B. 141)
